# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: se-thirdparty-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  exportTo:
    - "."
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
    - api.twilio.com
    - api.sendgrid.com
    - api.github.com
    - api.segment.io
    - api.datadoghq.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
    - name: https
      number: 443
      protocol: TLS
  endpoints: []

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-thirdparty-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  exportTo:
    - "."
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
    - api.twilio.com
    - api.sendgrid.com
    - api.github.com
    - api.segment.io
    - api.datadoghq.com
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.stripe.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.stripe.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.twilio.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.twilio.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.sendgrid.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.sendgrid.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.github.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.github.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.segment.io
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.segment.io
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.datadoghq.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.datadoghq.com
            port:
              number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: se-external-databases
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  exportTo:
    - "."
  hosts:
    - mydb-postgres.example.com
    - mycache-redis.example.com
    - mydb-mysql.example.com
    - docdb-mongodb.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
    - name: postgres
      number: 5432
      protocol: TCP
    - name: redis
      number: 6379
      protocol: TCP
    - name: mysql
      number: 3306
      protocol: TCP
    - name: mongodb
      number: 27017
      protocol: TCP
  endpoints: []

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-databases
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  exportTo:
    - "."
  hosts:
    - mydb-postgres.example.com
    - mycache-redis.example.com
    - mydb-mysql.example.com
    - docdb-mongodb.example.com
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: mydb-postgres.example.com
            port:
              number: 5432
    - match:
        - port: 6379
      route:
        - destination:
            host: mycache-redis.example.com
            port:
              number: 6379
    - match:
        - port: 3306
      route:
        - destination:
            host: mydb-mysql.example.com
            port:
              number: 3306
    - match:
        - port: 27017
      route:
        - destination:
            host: docdb-mongodb.example.com
            port:
              number: 27017
